advancedBookmarkDetails.message: Ngā taipitopito tohuwāhi arā atu anō

advancedDetailsHelp.message: Whirihorahia te tirohanga metadata arā atu anō me te whakatika arā atu anō e tautokona ana i te pihanga Taipitopito.

allowKeyboardDelete.message: Tukua te kī Delete ki te muku i ngā mea kua tīpakohia

allowKeyboardDeleteHelp.message: Ina monokia, kāore te kī Delete e muku i ngā tāurunga tohuwāhi kua tīpakohia.

appDescription.message: He kaiwhakahaere tohuwāhi paetata māmā mō ngā pūtirotiro Chromium, i whakaaweawehia e Firefox Places, te pūnaha whakahaere tohuwāhi a Firefox.

chooseSortModeTitle.message: Kōwhiria te aratau raupapa mō te pihanga waenga. Ka whakamahi te Taunoa i te raupapa kōpaki a Chromium.

couldNotMoveBookmark.message: Kāore i taea te neke i te tūemi tohuwāhi: {error}

couldNotOpenBookmark.message: Kāore i taea te huaki i te tohuwāhi: {error}

couldNotOpenTabGroup.message: Kāore i taea te huaki i te rōpū ripa: {error}

couldNotOpenWindow.message: Kāore i taea te huaki i te matapihi {windowType}: {error}

couldNotSaveChanges.message: Kāore i taea te tiaki huringa: {error}

currentFolderAndSubfolders.message: Kōpaki o nāianei me ngā kōpaki-roto

debugFailureUnexpectedSuccess.message: I angitu ohorere te rahunga patuiro

debugOptionsHelp.message: Arā atu anō. Ka whakaatu i ngā mana whakamātau patuiro anake. Me waiho kia monokia mō te whakamahi noa.

debugSettingsHelp.message: Ngā mana ka whakaaturia anake ina whakahohea ngā kōwhiringa Patuiro.

deleteMultipleConfirm.message: Mukua ngā tūemi kua tīpakohia e {count}?

doubleClickExpandCollapseTitle.message: Pāwhiri-rua kia whakawhānui, kia whakakopa rānei i tēnei kōpaki

dragFolderTitle.message: Tōia kia whakaraupapatia anō tēnei kōpaki

dragItemTitle.message: Tōia kia nekehia, kia whakaraupapatia anō rānei tēnei tūemi

emptyDetails.message: Tīpakohia tētahi tūemi, tīpakohia rānei tētahi kōpaki hei whakaatu i ōna ihirangi.

enableAdvancedEditing.message: Whakahohea te whakatika taipitopito arā atu anō

enableAdvancedEditingHelp.message: Tukua te whakatika arā atu anō e tautokona ana, i tēnei wā he whāiti ki ngā huringa taupū tohuwāhi.

enableAdvancedViewing.message: Whakahohea te tirohanga taipitopito arā atu anō

enableAdvancedViewingHelp.message: Whakaaturia ngā metadata tohuwāhi arā atu anō pānui-anake ki te pihanga Taipitopito.

folderContentsViewHelp.message: Whirihorahia ngā whānui tīwae o te pihanga Ihirangi Kōpaki me ngā tīwae kōwhiri. Ka whakaaturia tonutia te Ingoa me te URL.

fontHelp.message: Ka whakahaere i te whānau momotuhi matua e whakamahia ana e te atanga kaiwhakahaere tohuwāhi.

fontSizeHelp.message: Rahi kuputuhi taketake. Ka āwhata ngā upoko me ngā tapanga tīwae ki tēnei uara.

fontSpacingHelp.message: Whakarea mokowā rārangi mō ngā haupae me ngā tapanga kikī ake, pānui-ngāwari ake rānei.

leftLibWidthHelp.message: Whānui ā-pika mō te pihanga Pātaka mauī.

midFcShowDateAddedHelp.message: Whakaaturia, hunaia rānei te tīwae Rā Tāpiri i te pihanga Ihirangi Kōpaki.

midFcShowIdHelp.message: Whakaaturia, hunaia rānei te tīwae ID tohuwāhi Chromium.

midFcShowOrderHelp.message: Whakaaturia, hunaia rānei te tīwae raupapa/taupū kōpaki Chromium.

midFcWidthDateAddedHelp.message: Whānui ā-pika mō te tīwae kōwhiri Rā Tāpiri.

midFcWidthIdHelp.message: Whānui ā-pika mō te tīwae kōwhiri ID.

midFcWidthNameHelp.message: Whānui ā-pika mō te tīwae Ingoa Ihirangi Kōpaki.

midFcWidthOrderHelp.message: Whānui ā-pika mō te tīwae kōwhiri raupapa/taupū Chromium.

midFcWidthUrlHelp.message: Whānui ā-pika mō te tīwae URL Ihirangi Kōpaki.

multipleInstancesAllowedHelp.message: Ina monokia, mā te pāwhiri i te pātene toronga ka arotahi ki te ripa Simple Bookmarks Manager e tū ana, kaua ki te huaki i tētahi atu.

mutationCreateFromClipboardSnapshot.message: waihanga mai i te whakaahua papatopenga

mutationReorderSelectedItems.message: whakaraupapa anō i ngā tūemi kua tīpakohia

naturalSort.message: Whakamahia te raupapa māori mō ngā kōpaki/tohuwāhi

naturalSortHelp.message: Ko te Raupapa Pūmau mā te Ingoa ka tuku i ngā kōpaki ki mua, kātahi ngā whakawehe, kātahi ngā tohuwāhi.

openAllInNewTab.message: Huaki Katoa ki te Ripa Hōu

openAllInNewTabGroup.message: Huaki Katoa ki te Rōpū Ripa Hōu

openAllInNewWindow.message: Huaki Katoa ki te Matapihi Hōu

openAllInPrivateWindow.message: Huaki Katoa ki te Matapihi Tūmataiti

openAllInSplitView.message: Huaki Katoa ki te Tirohanga Wehe

openInNewTabGroup.message: Huaki ki te Rōpū Ripa Hōu

optimisationDOMrenderingHelp.message: Whakamātau. Ka whakaiti i te rerekētanga DOM mō te tāhuahua tīpakonga, ngā tohu tō/me-te-tuku, me te whakahaere ata haupae. Monokia anake ina whakataurite mahinga, ina raparongoā whanonga UI rānei.

optimisationTempBookmarkTreeMapsHelp.message: Whakamātau. Ka hanga mahere rapunga rangitahi i ētahi mahi tāhuahua/rapu/rākau, kātahi ka whakarerea kia karo i tētahi keteroki pūmau kua tawhito.

optimisationsHelp.message: Ngā kōwhiringa mahinga whakamātau mō te ine paearu me te raparongoā.

paneWidthsHelp.message: Whirihorahia ngā whānui pihanga Pātaka me Taipitopito. Ka whakahōutia hoki ēnei ina whakarahi anōtia ngā pihanga i te atanga kaiwhakahaere.

resizeColumn.message: Tōia kia whakarahi anō i te tīwae

resizeDetailsPane.message: Whakarahi anō i te pihanga Taipitopito

resizeLibraryPane.message: Whakarahi anō i te pihanga Pātaka

rightDetailsWidthHelp.message: Whānui ā-pika mō te pihanga Taipitopito matau.

searchLimitFull.message: Whakawhāitihia te Rapu ki te Kōpaki o Nāianei me ngā Kōpaki-roto

searchLimitOptionHelp.message: Ina whakahohea, ka rapu te pouaka rapu matua i roto anake i te rākau kōpaki e kitea ana i tēnei wā.

searchLimitTitle.message: Ina whakahohea, rapua anake te kōpaki o nāianei me ōna kōpaki-roto. Ina monokia, rapua ngā tohuwāhi katoa.

showDeleteWarningHelp.message: Pātaihia i mua i te muku i ngā tūemi tohuwāhi, i ngā kōpaki rānei.

showErrorsWarningsHelp.message: Arā atu anō. Ka whakaatu i tētahi rangitaki rangitahi ā-pūmahara mō tēnei wātū SBM. Kāore ngā tāurunga rangitaki e tiakina ki ngā tautuhinga toronga.

showSortWarningHelp.message: Pātaihia i mua i te whakamahi i ngā raupapa tahua-horopaki ka whakaraupapa pūmau i tētahi kōpaki tohuwāhi.

sortDateAscTooltip.message: Raupapa mā te rā tāpiri: ko te mea tawhito ki mua

sortDateDescTooltip.message: Raupapa mā te rā tāpiri: ko te mea hōu ki mua

sortDefaultTooltip.message: Raupapa kōpaki Chromium taunoa. Pāwhiri kia hoki ki te raupapa Taunoa; kāore tēnei tīwae e raupapa-whakamuri.

sortFolderConfirm.message:
Raupapatia "{folderName}" mā te {sortName}?

Ka huri pūmau tēnei i te raupapa tohuwāhi kua tiakina ki Chromium. He rerekē tēnei i te takaiho Raupapa tirohanga rangitahi.

sortIdAscTooltip.message: Raupapa mā te ID: iti rawa ki mua

sortIdDescTooltip.message: Raupapa mā te ID: nui rawa ki mua

sortNameAscTooltip.message: Raupapa mā te ingoa: A ki Z

sortNameDescTooltip.message: Raupapa mā te ingoa: Z ki A

sortSelectDateAddedTitle.message: Raupapa rā tāpiri. Ko te piki haere, ko te mea tawhito ki mua; ko te heke haere, ko te mea hōu ki mua.

sortSelectIdTitle.message: Raupapa ID. Ko te piki haere, ko te iti rawa ki mua; ko te heke haere, ko te nui rawa ki mua.

sortSelectTitleTitle.message: Raupapa ingoa. Ko te piki haere, ko A ki Z; ko te heke haere, ko Z ki A.

sortSelectUrlTitle.message: Raupapa URL. Ko te piki haere, ko A ki Z; ko te heke haere, ko Z ki A.

sortUrlAscTooltip.message: Raupapa mā te URL: A ki Z

sortUrlDescTooltip.message: Raupapa mā te URL: Z ki A

unsavedChanges.message: Ngā huringa kāore anō kia tiakina

unsavedChangesMessage.message: He huringa kāore anō kia tiakina kei te pihanga Taipitopito. He aha tāu e hiahia ana kia mahia?

urlWarningControlCharacters.message: I whai pūāhua whakahaere huna te URL; ka tangohia i mua i te tiaki.

urlWarningEmpty.message: He putu te URL. Tērā pea ka whakakāhoretia e Chrome tēnei tohuwāhi kia tukuna rā anō he URL.

urlWarningInvalidBlocked.message: Kāore tēnei URL i te tika kia tiakina hei tohuwāhi. Whakatikaina te URL i mua i te tiaki.

urlWarningInvalidButAllowed.message: Kāore tēnei URL i te tino tika hei tiaki hei tohuwāhi. Whakatikaina te URL i mua i te tiaki.

urlWarningWhitespace.message: He mokowā kei roto i te URL. Ka tiakina mēnā ka whakaae a Chrome, engari tērā pea kāore e huaki tika.

userInterfaceLanguageHelp.message: Ka whai te Aunoa i te reo UI o te pūtirotiro. Ka pā ngā kōwhiringa ā-ringa ki te kaiwhakahaere me ngā whārangi kōwhiringa.

warningsErrorsLogEmpty.message: Kāore he whakatūpato, he hapa rānei i tuhia mō tēnei wātū.

warningsErrorsLogHelp.message: Ngā whakatūpato/hapa rangitahi mō tēnei wātū SBM o nāianei. Kāore tēnei e tiakina ki ngā tautuhinga.

bookmarkUrlProtectionsHelp.message: Whakahaerehia ngā whakamarutanga mō ngā kaupapa URL tohuwāhi mōrearea ake. Ka pā ēnei whakamarutanga ki te whakatuwhera tohuwāhi anake, kāore ki te tiaki.

blockJavascriptBookmarkOpens.message: Ārai i te whakatuwhera tohuwāhi javascript:

blockJavascriptBookmarkOpensHelp.message: E taunakitia ana. Ka aukati i a SBM kia kaua e whakatuwhera bookmarklets, ētahi atu URL javascript: rānei mā ngā mahi ripa/matapihi o te toronga.

blockDataBookmarkOpens.message: Ārai i te whakatuwhera tohuwāhi data:

blockDataBookmarkOpensHelp.message: E taunakitia ana. Ka aukati i a SBM kia kaua e whakatuwhera tuhinga data: ā-roto mā ngā mahi ripa/matapihi o te toronga.

blockBlobBookmarkOpens.message: Ārai i te whakatuwhera tohuwāhi blob:

blockBlobBookmarkOpensHelp.message: E taunakitia ana. Ka aukati i a SBM kia kaua e whakatuwhera URL blob: mā ngā mahi ripa/matapihi o te toronga.

urlOpenBlockedByProtection.message: Kua āraitia tēnei URL tohuwāhi e tētahi whakamarutanga whakatuwhera URL arā atu anō. Ka taea te arotake i ngā takahuri whakamarutanga i Options > Advanced.
